description_long: This water gun features a playful and colorful design, with a predominantly yellow-orange body accented by a large, cylindrical green water reservoir mounted on top. The front of the gun is equipped with a green nozzle, encircled by a yellow ring with white chevron markings, suggesting the direction of water flow. The handle is ergonomically shaped and colored green, with a visible trigger area and a small orange guard beneath. Decorative elements include a purple accent near the rear and a small orange box with three white squares on the underside, likely representing a stylized battery or pressure chamber. The overall construction appears to be lightweight, with smooth, rounded edges and a glossy plastic finish, making it suitable for children in urban parks or backyards.
description: A colorful, plastic water gun with a green top reservoir, yellow-orange body, and green nozzle, featuring playful accents and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, green top reservoir, yellow-orange body, green nozzle, and orange grip details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular green nozzle and yellow chevron ring, with the reservoir and body aligned behind.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with visible handle, trigger area, and orange accent box.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the green reservoir and the end of the yellow-orange body, with the handle base visible.
attribute_trigger_design: The trigger is a standard pull type, located within the green handle area, with a simple, smooth design and no visible texturing or color contrast.
attribute_nozzle_type: The nozzle is a single, round, green plastic tip encircled by a yellow ring with white chevron markings, suggesting a standard water jet output.
attribute_water_reservoir_style: The water reservoir is a large, cylindrical, green tank mounted horizontally on top of the gun, integrated into the body with visible mounting brackets and no detachable features apparent.
attribute_grip_pattern: The grip area is smooth green plastic with a slight ergonomic curve, lacking visible texturing or pattern, and extends from the base of the handle to the trigger guard.
